prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-10PCDELUXEFLSHLGHT-BLK-FL3654RC Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal 300 Lumens Adjustable LED Flashlight Set with Rechargeable Batteries and Traffic Wand, 10pc Description: With a notable list of practical and applicable features, as well as a durable and long-lasting aluminum body, this ASR Federal rechargeable flashlight is a multipurpose light that's functionality goes beyond all other flashlights in your current arsenal of tools and equipment.

FEATURES:

- Two power options (rechargeable battery and AAA battery carriage)
- Interchangeable light filters (blue, red, amber, green)
- Long-lasting 5W LED bulb
- Orange traffic wand attachment
- Adjustable focus ring
- 3-stage mode switch (high, low and strobe)
- 4-inch secure lanyard wrist strap
- USB charger

The two most unique features of this flashlight are firstly, the interchangeable light filters and secondly, the traffic wand attachment. The light filters are easy to swap in and out; the red light filter is invisible to most animals and helps with illumination; the amber and blue light filters make it easier to track blood trails; the green light filter helps to filter foliage; all the light filters will also help to preserve night vision. Secondly, the traffic wand attachment screws on to the head of the rechargeable LED flashlight, providing easily visible light in the event of an of emergency or natural disaster, or allow for traffic direction as way wand.

Keep in your car, emergency kit, bug out bag or with your tactical gear, the ASR Federal rechargeable flashlight set is a must-have when taking to the field, hunting, partaking in emergency response work, trekking, hiking and much more. Search Terms: EDC flashlight LED survival kit bug out bag police spy detective equipment gadgets camping gear backpacking trekking hiking walking running traffic wand rechargeable batteries first aid supplies prepper tools tech hunting Features: - MULTIFUNCTIONAL FLASHLIGHT: With 2 power options-rechargeable battery and AAA battery carriage- interchangeable light filters, a 5W LED bulb, a traffic wand attachment, adjustable focus ring, 3-stage switch and partial knurled body for comfortable handling, this ASR Federal rechargeable flashlight is a must-have in your arsenal of equipment and tools - ADVANTAGEOUS LIGHT FILTERS: Easy to swap in and out, the included light filters are advantageous to have in your arsenal of tools; the red light filter is invisible to most animals and helps with illumination; the amber and blue light filters make it easier to track blood trails; the green light filter helps to filter foliage; all the light filters will also help to preserve night vision - UNIQUE TRAFFIC WAND ATTACHMENT: Featuring a unique traffic want attachment that screws on to the head of the rechargeable LED flashlight, this will give provide easily visible light in case of emergency or natural disaster or allow for traffic direction as way wand; easily secure to wrist if you're on the move with the included 4-inch lanyard wrist strap - FLASHLIGHT SET INCLUDES: This ASR Federal LED flashlight set includes the following components: adjustable focus ring, filter ring with 4 colored filters, 6-inch orange traffic wand attachment, rechargeable 1200mAh 3.7V battery, 3AAA battery housing, a USB charger and 4-inch lanyard - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 6 x 1 3/8 diameter (inches); Watts: 5; Lumens: 300; Material: Aluminum; 3AAA Batteries: Adapter Included (batteries not included); Rechargeable Battery 1200mAH 3.7V (battery included); 4 Inch lanyard included; Operating time: 3-4 hours; Full recharge: 4-5 hours === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
